subcodes.title: Words spoken in Feb. 1910
subcodes.first_line: The Bounty of God is within the heart; it receives the Light... The bounty is dormant or latent in the hearts. Belief and faith make it appear
subcodes.subjects: @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition, @development of capacity and readiness, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @soul is the essential reality of man, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
